title: Khmer Creation: Preah Thong and Neang Neak
description: The Cambodian foundation myth: an Indian prince marries a naga princess, and from their union the Khmer civilization is born.
introduction: The Cambodian foundation myth: an Indian prince marries a naga princess, and from their union the Khmer civilization is born.

translation.text: Preah Thong came from across the sea and married the Naga princess. From their union the Khmer people were born.
